text:
Goldie found a little house in the forest.
Mmm, yummy smell!
She went inside.

Tiny bowl —
just right!
All gone!

Big chair —  too HARD!
Medium chair —  too SOFT!

Tiny chair —
just right!
But…  CRACK! It broke!

Big bed —  too HARD!
Medium bed —  too SOFT!

Tiny bed —
just right…
Zzz, Goldie fell asleep.

The bears came home!
"Someone's in my bed!"

Goldie said sorry.
They all became… friends!
